channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spanish forward Lamine Yama…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spanish forward Lamine Yamal’s 3-year-old half-brother, Keyne, has become a star at this World Cup. Keyne's celebrations as Spain have progressed through the tournament have been a social media sensation.
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spanish forward Lamine Yamal’s 3-year-old half-brother, Keyne, has become a star at this World Cup. Keyne's celebrations as Spain have progressed through the tournament have been a social media sensation.

item.title: Trump says he will allow Ukraine to manufacture Patriot miss…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Trump says he will allow Ukraine to manufacture Patriot missile interceptors, a key weapon in repelling Russian attacks
item.content:encoded: Trump says he will allow Ukraine to manufacture Patriot missile interceptors, a key weapon in repelling Russian attacks

item.title: The Defense Department was funded with a budget of nearly a …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The Defense Department was funded with a budget of nearly a trillion dollars, but it is running out of cash, according to three U.S. officials, a former defense official, outside experts and two congressional staff members.
item.content:encoded: The Defense Department was funded with a budget of nearly a trillion dollars, but it is running out of cash, according to three U.S. officials, a former defense official, outside experts and two congressional staff members.

item.title: #🔖世の中 「人参はまるごとレンチンして！」潰して混ぜるだけ！意外と知らない「人参のおいしい食べ方」（ぱるとよ） - …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「人参はまるごとレンチンして！」潰して混ぜるだけ！意外と知らない「人参のおいしい食べ方」（ぱるとよ） - エキスパート - Yahoo!ニュース

人参を買ったものの、いつも同じ切り方や調理法になっていませんか？ 実は、人参を切らずに「まるごと電子レンジで加熱」することで、調理が簡単になり、包丁やまな板の出番を減らせます。 今回は潰して混ぜるだけで完成する手軽な一品をご紹介します。毎日の食卓の彩りや、常備菜としても重宝しますよ。 材料人参：2本...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「人参はまるごとレンチンして！」潰して混ぜるだけ！意外と知らない「人参のおいしい食べ方」（ぱるとよ） - エキスパート - Yahoo!ニュース

人参を買ったものの、いつも同じ切り方や調理法になっていませんか？ 実は、人参を切らずに「まるごと電子レンジで加熱」することで、調理が簡単になり、包丁やまな板の出番を減らせます。 今回は潰して混ぜるだけで完成する手軽な一品をご紹介します。毎日の食卓の彩りや、常備菜としても重宝しますよ。 材料人参：2本...

item.title: Yet another brutal heat dome is set to roast part of the Uni…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)

item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:

item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Judge rejects Kalshi bid to block New York gambling enforcement law reut.rs/4gnkiRX

item.title: Mars Petcare recalled some cans of its Pedigree dog food tha…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Mars Petcare recalled some cans of its Pedigree dog food that it said had been sold to consumers even though they were flagged to be destroyed after failing quality-control tests. The company said that the cans of food may contain metal or plastic.
item.content:encoded: Mars Petcare recalled some cans of its Pedigree dog food that it said had been sold to consumers even though they were flagged to be destroyed after failing quality-control tests. The company said that the cans of food may contain metal or plastic.

item.title: From @theathletic.com: Arthur Féry, a British wild card who …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathletic.com: Arthur Féry, a British wild card who had only ever played one Grand Slam match in his career, defeated No. 9 seed Flavio Cobolli to reach the Wimbledon semifinals. Féry has performed miracle after miracle at Wimbledon.
item.content:encoded: From @theathletic.com: Arthur Féry, a British wild card who had only ever played one Grand Slam match in his career, defeated No. 9 seed Flavio Cobolli to reach the Wimbledon semifinals. Féry has performed miracle after miracle at Wimbledon.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 二階堂地獄ゴルフ - 福本伸行 / 第１３７話「本心」 | コミックDAYS 二階堂地獄ゴルフ …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
二階堂地獄ゴルフ - 福本伸行 / 第１３７話「本心」 | コミックDAYS

二階堂地獄ゴルフ 福本伸行 「カイジ」シリーズの福本伸行氏、完全新作‥！ 所属クラブに支援を受けつつプロテストに挑戦するも10年連続で不合格‥の二階堂進、35歳。プロゴルファーの称号をどうしても諦めることができない彼の未来に待つのは、天国か‥あるいは地獄か‥。
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
二階堂地獄ゴルフ - 福本伸行 / 第１３７話「本心」 | コミックDAYS

二階堂地獄ゴルフ 福本伸行 「カイジ」シリーズの福本伸行氏、完全新作‥！ 所属クラブに支援を受けつつプロテストに挑戦するも10年連続で不合格‥の二階堂進、35歳。プロゴルファーの称号をどうしても諦めることができない彼の未来に待つのは、天国か‥あるいは地獄か‥。

item.title: “Heated Rivalry” launched a worldwide phenomenon when it fir…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: “Heated Rivalry” launched a worldwide phenomenon when it first premiered in November 2025. But an Emmy Awards rule makes the show ineligible from taking home the trophy.
item.content:encoded: “Heated Rivalry” launched a worldwide phenomenon when it first premiered in November 2025. But an Emmy Awards rule makes the show ineligible from taking home the trophy.

item.title: President Trump threatened to cut off trade with Spain at th…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: President Trump threatened to cut off trade with Spain at the NATO summit in Turkey on Wednesday. A move against the country would face political, legal and practical issues and probably provoke a wider trade war with the European Union.
item.content:encoded: President Trump threatened to cut off trade with Spain at the NATO summit in Turkey on Wednesday. A move against the country would face political, legal and practical issues and probably provoke a wider trade war with the European Union.

item.title: The Mexican national was shot by a federal agent in Houston …
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: The Mexican national was shot by a federal agent in Houston Tuesday morning, with ICE claiming he weaponized his vehicle.
item.content:encoded: The Mexican national was shot by a federal agent in Houston Tuesday morning, with ICE claiming he weaponized his vehicle.

item.title: #🔖世の中 イランを「日本」と言い間違え トランプ氏：時事ドットコム イランを「日本」と言い間違え トランプ氏 時事…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
イランを「日本」と言い間違え　トランプ氏：時事ドットコム

イランを「日本」と言い間違え　トランプ氏 時事通信 国際報道部2026年07月08日23時25分配信 【アンカラ時事】トランプ米大統領は８日、ウクライナのゼレンスキー大統領とアンカラで行った会談でイランとの戦闘に触れ、「日本イスラム共和国」から米空母が攻撃を受けたと語った。「イラン・イスラム共和国」と言うべきと...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
イランを「日本」と言い間違え　トランプ氏：時事ドットコム

イランを「日本」と言い間違え　トランプ氏 時事通信 国際報道部2026年07月08日23時25分配信 【アンカラ時事】トランプ米大統領は８日、ウクライナのゼレンスキー大統領とアンカラで行った会談でイランとの戦闘に触れ、「日本イスラム共和国」から米空母が攻撃を受けたと語った。「イラン・イスラム共和国」と言うべきと...

item.title: The Israeli military alleges that the doctor was “apprehende…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The Israeli military alleges that the doctor was “apprehended for suspected involvement in terrorist activities, and for holding a rank” in Hamas. It has not provided substantive evidence for the claim.
item.content:encoded: The Israeli military alleges that the doctor was “apprehended for suspected involvement in terrorist activities, and for holding a rank” in Hamas. It has not provided substantive evidence for the claim.

item.title: A Palestinian doctor, who has been in Israeli custody for 18…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A Palestinian doctor, who has been in Israeli custody for 18 months with no charge, fears “imminent death,” as the UN and experts urge for his release.
item.content:encoded: A Palestinian doctor, who has been in Israeli custody for 18 months with no charge, fears “imminent death,” as the UN and experts urge for his release.

item.title: Kaon AI, which builds personalized story worlds using its AI…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Kaon AI, which builds personalized story worlds using its AI-based FlowGPT and Emochi tools, raised $60M from B Capital and others, and says Emochi has 2M DAUs (Corbin Bolies/Variety)

item.content:encoded:

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 「ひどい同盟国」 トランプ氏、スペインとの通商停止指示 【7月8日 AFP】北大西洋条約機構（NAT…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
「ひどい同盟国」 トランプ氏、スペインとの通商停止指示

【7月8日 AFP】北大西洋条約機構（NATO）首脳会議に出席するためにトルコ・アンカラを訪問しているドナルド・トランプ米大統領は8日、NATO加盟国への不満を爆発させた。特にスペインを名指しして、貿易を停止すると強く迫った。 会議を前にNATOのマルク・ルッテ事務総長と会談したトランプ氏は、記者団に対し「私はNATO...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
「ひどい同盟国」 トランプ氏、スペインとの通商停止指示

【7月8日 AFP】北大西洋条約機構（NATO）首脳会議に出席するためにトルコ・アンカラを訪問しているドナルド・トランプ米大統領は8日、NATO加盟国への不満を爆発させた。特にスペインを名指しして、貿易を停止すると強く迫った。 会議を前にNATOのマルク・ルッテ事務総長と会談したトランプ氏は、記者団に対し「私はNATO...

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー AWS Well-Architected Framework 入門：全体像と公式ドキュメントを整理し…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
AWS Well-Architected Framework 入門：全体像と公式ドキュメントを整理してみた | DevelopersIO

AWS認定試験の学習で頻繁に登場する「Well-Architected Framework」について、全容を把握しきれていないという課題を解決するため、6つの柱をハンズオンで実践しながら学ぶシリーズを始めます。まず今回は、Framework の概要と情報の探し方を整理しました。 はじめに こんにちは。クラスメソッドオペレーションズの藤瀨...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
AWS Well-Architected Framework 入門：全体像と公式ドキュメントを整理してみた | DevelopersIO

AWS認定試験の学習で頻繁に登場する「Well-Architected Framework」について、全容を把握しきれていないという課題を解決するため、6つの柱をハンズオンで実践しながら学ぶシリーズを始めます。まず今回は、Framework の概要と情報の探し方を整理しました。 はじめに こんにちは。クラスメソッドオペレーションズの藤瀨...

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 やっぱり高市首相の｢外国人政策｣はおかしい…｢人手不足｣とウソをつき｢安い移民｣受け入れを進める黒幕の…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
やっぱり高市首相の｢外国人政策｣はおかしい…｢人手不足｣とウソをつき｢安い移民｣受け入れを進める黒幕の正体【"移民"政策3選】

やっぱり高市首相の｢外国人政策｣はおかしい…｢人手不足｣とウソをつき｢安い移民｣受け入れを進める黒幕の正体【"移民"政策3選】 人手不足でも日本人の給料が上がらない理由 建設業やサービス業をはじめとした様々な現場で、深刻な人手不足が叫ばれています。政府は労働力を確保するために外国人労働者の受け入れ拡大を続け...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
やっぱり高市首相の｢外国人政策｣はおかしい…｢人手不足｣とウソをつき｢安い移民｣受け入れを進める黒幕の正体【"移民"政策3選】

やっぱり高市首相の｢外国人政策｣はおかしい…｢人手不足｣とウソをつき｢安い移民｣受け入れを進める黒幕の正体【"移民"政策3選】 人手不足でも日本人の給料が上がらない理由 建設業やサービス業をはじめとした様々な現場で、深刻な人手不足が叫ばれています。政府は労働力を確保するために外国人労働者の受け入れ拡大を続け...

item.title: Eight Iranian army members killed in U.S. attacks on souther…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Eight Iranian army members killed in U.S. attacks on southern parts of Iran reut.rs/4pcGlgr
item.content:encoded: Eight Iranian army members killed in U.S. attacks on southern parts of Iran reut.rs/4pcGlgr

item.title: In Opinion “Multiple things can be true about GLP-1s,” Jess…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In Opinion

“Multiple things can be true about GLP-1s,” Jessica Grose writes. “They are truly miracles and may treat a whole range of conditions beyond obesity and diabetes. And they are often misused, partly because we have told women in multiple ways that being thin makes them valuable.”
item.content:encoded:
In Opinion

“Multiple things can be true about GLP-1s,” Jessica Grose writes. “They are truly miracles and may treat a whole range of conditions beyond obesity and diabetes. And they are often misused, partly because we have told women in multiple ways that being thin makes them valuable.”

item.title: ‘I dealt with death, bankruptcy and HIV in three months’: An…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: ‘I dealt with death, bankruptcy and HIV in three months’: Andreas Angelidakis on his radical, Ru Paul-influenced art installation
item.content:encoded: ‘I dealt with death, bankruptcy and HIV in three months’: Andreas Angelidakis on his radical, Ru Paul-influenced art installation

item.content:encoded: Ancient quasars add to a 'major unsolved problem' in astrophysics reut.rs/4eN6bEk

item.title: When something is not in Lauren Thorpe's budget, she says ju…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: When something is not in Lauren Thorpe's budget, she says just that. She's practicing 'loud budgeting' — a trend in which Gen Zers openly discuss what they can and cannot afford so they can curb spending without shame reut.rs/4y7ybdv
item.content:encoded: When something is not in Lauren Thorpe's budget, she says just that. She's practicing 'loud budgeting' — a trend in which Gen Zers openly discuss what they can and cannot afford so they can curb spending without shame reut.rs/4y7ybdv

item.title: D.C. Circuit challenge and DEA hearing put federal cannabis …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: D.C. Circuit challenge and DEA hearing put federal cannabis rescheduling to the test reut.rs/4vSxEut
item.content:encoded: D.C. Circuit challenge and DEA hearing put federal cannabis rescheduling to the test reut.rs/4vSxEut

item.title: The nominations of the 2026 Emmy Awards are being announced …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The nominations of the 2026 Emmy Awards are being announced in Los Angeles at an event hosted by stars from “The Bear” and “Somebody Somewhere.” Follow updates here. nyti.ms/4eRy6mH
item.content:encoded: The nominations of the 2026 Emmy Awards are being announced in Los Angeles at an event hosted by stars from “The Bear” and “Somebody Somewhere.” Follow updates here. nyti.ms/4eRy6mH

item.title: President Donald Trump spent the bulk of his speech at the N…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump spent the bulk of his speech at the NATO summit airing frustrations about Iran, telling allies that the US isn’t interested in regime change anymore and that European countries have let him down repeatedly.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump spent the bulk of his speech at the NATO summit airing frustrations about Iran, telling allies that the US isn’t interested in regime change anymore and that European countries have let him down repeatedly.

item.title: The staffing change in the state auditor’s office comes afte…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The staffing change in the state auditor’s office comes after reporting revealed the operative, Dallas Woodhouse, was asking county officials to change their early voting plans.
item.content:encoded: The staffing change in the state auditor’s office comes after reporting revealed the operative, Dallas Woodhouse, was asking county officials to change their early voting plans.

item.title: Perspective: If voters must prove they belong, leaders shoul…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Perspective: If voters must prove they belong, leaders should prove they can still serve.
item.content:encoded: Perspective: If voters must prove they belong, leaders should prove they can still serve.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Egypt’s goal against Argent…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Egypt’s goal against Argentina should never have been ruled out, a former referee writes. "Argentina’s collective failure to defend their goal because they allowed Ziko to run past them is not part of the decision-making process." nyti.ms/3T8pcIO
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Egypt’s goal against Argentina should never have been ruled out, a former referee writes. "Argentina’s collective failure to defend their goal because they allowed Ziko to run past them is not part of the decision-making process." nyti.ms/3T8pcIO
